narrative:
Precinct Geneva 2 (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 837 registered voters, with 59.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a modest Republican lean of 2.0 percentage points.
